name: GYD550 Steering Gyro
description: Futaba GYD550 drift counter-steer gyro. No PC software - all settings are adjusted wirelessly from a Futaba S.BUS2 transmitter.
notes: Hardware-only device: no PC app - confirmed absent from Futaba's software index in all three regions. Futaba has marked the GYD550 discontinued; its successor is the GYD560, which unlike this unit does ship a Windows updater (see futaba-gyd560).
